---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What gap or frustration is this feature addressing? Be specific. -->
<!-- e.g. "There's no way to filter out low-severity alerts, so my dashboard is cluttered during minor weather events." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe what you'd like to see added or changed. -->

## Feature Area
<!-- Which part of the integration does this relate to? Check all that apply. -->
- [ ] Feed management (adding, removing, custom URLs)
- [ ] Alert filtering or severity thresholds
- [ ] Sensor/entity data or attributes
- [ ] Automation support (triggers, conditions, templates)
- [ ] Lovelace card (Stage 2)
- [ ] Polling / refresh behaviour
- [ ] Rate limiting / performance
- [ ] Configuration UI (config flow)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Alert Sources Involved
<!-- If relevant, which providers does this feature relate to? -->
- [ ] MetService
- [ ] NEMA
- [ ] GeoNet
- [ ] AEM (Auckland Emergency Management)
- [ ] Custom feeds
- [ ] All / not source-specific

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you found any workarounds or other approaches? What are their limitations? -->

## Roadmap Alignment
<!-- Does this relate to anything already on the roadmap? -->
- [ ] Stage 2 Lovelace card
- [ ] Geometry rendering / SVG mini-map
- [ ] Dismissible alerts
- [ ] Offline-first caching
- [ ] Webhook support
- [ ] Not on current roadmap

## Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, example automation YAML, links to CAP spec references, or anything else that helps explain the request. -->
